title: Custom Authentication with UI Plugin Configuration
description: Configure custom token-based authentication with app and user mappings. Tokens can also be managed via the plugin's UI.

tokens.title: Authentication Tokens
tokens.description: List of valid tokens with their app and user mappings. Can also be managed via the plugin UI.

id.title: Token ID
id.description: Unique identifier for this token (auto-generated if not provided)

app_id.title: App ID
app_id.description: Numeric App ID from the database that this token authenticates

user_id.title: User ID
user_id.description: User identifier associated with this token

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional description for this token (e.g., 'John's dev token')

default_app_id.title: Default App ID
default_app_id.description: Fallback App ID if a token doesn't specify one (used for backward compatibility)

reject_unknown_tokens.title: Reject Unknown Tokens
reject_unknown_tokens.description: If true, reject tokens not in the configured list. If false, accept with default app ID.
